arts.ttl: Maxwel Cornet Arrives in Genoa for New Chapter with Rossoblù
arts.sum: Maxwell Cornet has officially landed in Genoa, marking the beginning of his new adventure with the Rossoblù. Following a swift transfer deal finalized late Friday night, the Ivorian winger arrived at Cristoforo Colombo Airport, ready to join his new team. The post Maxwel Cornet Arrives in Genoa for New Chapter with Rossoblù appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: I saw £11m Nottingham Forest player fluff his lines after getting golden chance to impress Nuno
Southampton are not ready for 90 minutes - Juric
arts.sum: Southampton manager Ivan Juric wants more consistency from his side after a poor first half in a narrow 3-2 loss to Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.
